{% extends "!layout.html" %} {# Nest the auto-generated alphabetical indexes under the "API REFERENCE" sidebar caption. Sphinx toctrees can't contain genindex/modindex, so render the normal navigation and splice the links in right after that caption. #} {% block menu %} {%- set toctree = toctree(maxdepth=theme_navigation_depth|int, collapse=theme_collapse_navigation|tobool, includehidden=theme_includehidden|tobool, titles_only=theme_titles_only|tobool) %} {%- set _idx = '
  • 🔤 A–Z Index
  • 📦 Module Index
' %} {%- if toctree %} {{ toctree | replace('API REFERENCE:

', 'API REFERENCE:

' ~ _idx) | safe }} {%- else %}
{{ toc }}
{%- endif %} {% endblock %}
